main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'incomplete removal of preservative... insufficient flushing' matches

key_signals.justification: C2: 6 signals (glicerina 320, ORP -10, aclarados 1, caudal 70%, cond, P)

alternatives.justification: C3: 3 alts (oxidacion, defecto fabricacion, O-rings) cortas

recommended_action.justification: C4: 2 aclarados 1h low-P + ramp gradual - matches gold sin CIP

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: generica 'si tras aclarados no mejora ORP/COD/dP -> reconsiderar'
